title: Data migration
excerpt: description: Migrate data from other cloud providers to R2 using Super Slurper or Sippy. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Quickly and easily migrate data from other cloud providers to R2\. Explore each option further by navigating to their respective documentation page. | Name | Description | When to use | | [Super Slurper](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/data-migration/super-slurper/) | Quickly migrate large amounts of data from other cloud providers to R2. | For one-time, comprehensive transfers. |
